synthesizedInputs: componentStyle (mostly captured; secondary and ghost variants inferred from observed patterns)
narrative.dos / donts (translated from observed visual moves)

display.purpose: Hero H1 only — "Be found everywhere search happens"

headline.purpose: Section H2s on home and feature pages

label.purpose: Chip and badge labels, footer headings, sometimes uppercase

shadows.name: glass-soft
shadows.purpose: The only shadow token observed (--mp-shadow-glass). Used on floating overlays and the cookie-consent strip.

patterns.name: social-proof-logos
patterns.evidence: home: customer logo strip; features, company: same strip

patterns.name: tool-tile
patterns.evidence: home, features: tinted square cards (mint/lavender/aqua) — color-coded tool tiles, signature visual

patterns.name: platform-overview-band
patterns.evidence: home: full-width product matrix below hero

voice.heroSubcopy: The leading platform to grow and measure brand visibility across virtually every digital channel.

tone.evidence: 27% uppercase headings; 40 distinct CTA labels; action-oriented imperative voice

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The Semrush Blue pill — every primary CTA across the site.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #008ff8; color: #ffffff; padding: 16px 32px; border: none; border-radius: 100px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #006dca; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #008ff87f; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: White pill with primary text — secondary action in dual-CTA pairs.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #ffffff; color: #181e15; padding: 16px 32px; border: 1px solid #d1d4db; border-radius: 100px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f4f5f7; }

components.name: URL Input (Hero)
components.description: The signature hero input field — centerpiece of the home page conversion.
components.html: <form class="ds-hero-form"><input class="ds-hero-input" placeholder="Enter your website" /><button class="ds-btn-primary">Get insights</button></form>
components.css: .ds-hero-form { display: inline-flex; gap: 8px; padding: 6px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #d1d4db; border-radius: 100px; max-width: 640px; width: 100%; } .ds-hero-input { flex: 1; border: 0; padding: 12px 20px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; outline: none; background: transparent; } .ds-hero-input::placeholder { color: #575c66; }

components.name: Tool Tile
components.description: Signature pattern — colored square card with icon, name, description, arrow link. Background tints rotate through mint, lavender, aqua.
components.html:
Keyword Magic Tool

Find the keywords your audience is searching for.

→
components.css: .ds-tool-tile { display: block; padding: 24px; border-radius: 20px; background: #dceeeb; color: #181e15; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: transform 200ms ease, background 200ms ease; } .ds-tool-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-tool-tile--lavender { background: #e8e1ff; } .ds-tool-tile--aqua { background: rgba(24, 240, 191, 0.15); } .ds-tool-tile h3 { font-family: 'Lazzer', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 24px; margin: 12px 0 8px; } .ds-tool-tile p { font-size: 14px; color: #575c66; margin: 0 0 16px; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-tool-tile__icon { display: inline-block; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; }

components.name: Pricing Tile
components.description: Three-up pricing card — title, price, feature list, CTA. Mint surface; flat by default.
components.html:
Pro

$139.95/mo

  • 5 projects
  • 500 keywords to track
  • 10,000 results per report
components.css: .ds-pricing-tile { background: #dceeeb; border-radius: 20px; padding: 32px; color: #181e15; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-pricing-tile h3 { font-family: 'Lazzer', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 28px; margin: 0 0 12px; } .ds-pricing-tile__price { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 16px; } .ds-pricing-tile__price span { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #575c66; } .ds-pricing-tile ul { padding: 0 0 24px 16px; margin: 0; } .ds-pricing-tile li { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Customer Logo Strip
components.description: Repeated proof pattern — a row of 8–12 grayscale customer logos. Appears on home, features, company.
components.css: .ds-logo-strip { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 48px; padding: 32px 0; opacity: 0.7; } .ds-logo-strip img { height: 24px; width: auto; filter: grayscale(1); }

narrative.overview: Semrush's surface is a marketing site that reads as a lightweight, pastel cousin of an operator dashboard. The hero starts on white. Below the fold, mint-into-lavender gradients carry the platform overview. Each tool gets a colored badge or tile — lime, aqua, lavender — but the primary action button is always the same signal blue. The dominant personality is bright-but-calm, dense-but-breathable, expert-friendly.
keyCharacteristics: White background plus tinted surfaces (mint, lavender); never a dark home page.
One signal blue (#008ff8) carries every primary CTA across the site.
Pill-radius (100px) for actions and chrome; 10px / 6px for cards and inputs.
Customer logo strip appears on home, features, and company — proof is structural.
Type scale is ad-hoc, not a strict modular ratio.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Primary blue (#008ff8) only appears on call-to-action buttons. Never on text, never on backgrounds wider than a button.

rules.name: The Tinted-Neutral Rule
rules.body: No #f5f5f5-family grays. Every neutral surface alt has a hue (mint or lavender). Pure neutral is only #ffffff and #181e15.

rules.name: The Two-Family Rule
rules.body: Lazzer for headings + chrome, Inter for body and form inputs. Never invert.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Sections, cards, and pricing tiles do not carry shadows. Depth is implied by surface color, not blur.

dos: Do carry every primary call-to-action in #008ff8, pill-shaped (100px radius). The One Voice Rule.
Do start every page on white. Tinted surfaces (mint, lavender) appear below the fold, never as the page-top background.
Do lead feature pages with a tool name; the brand treats tools as named characters.
Do keep the customer logo strip on home, features, and company — it's a structural proof move, not a decoration.
Do use Lazzer for every heading and Inter for every paragraph, no exceptions.
donts: Don't ship a dark-mode neon AI-startup aesthetic. Every gradient here is pastel, every CTA is on white.
Don't add screenshot-of-app dropshadow heroes. The hero centers on the URL input bar — the surface IS the product moment.
Don't introduce new chrome radii. 100px (pill) and 10px (card) are doing different jobs; 6px is for inputs.
Don't elevate cards. The brand is flat-default; only the glass-shadow token is allowed, and it's reserved for floating overlays.
Don't introduce a third type family. Lazzer + Inter is the pairing; serif and mono additions break the brand.
